action: Extend cli-version-freeze (ADR-0044 S3 / 68062dc5) to the claude family: the 2026-06-11 claude 2.1.173 self-update removed the 'esc to interrupt' affordance from generating panes, silently breaking PaneBusy (busy panes read idle -> stall -> pause -> exit=81; killed soak cycles 286/288 ~35min each). S3 froze codex only (codex updater state at ~/.codex/version.json). Fix direction: (a) brew-pin or version-freeze claude on soak hosts like codex; (b) preflight check compares claude --version against a pinned known-good and HALTs (or warns) on drift; (c) consider a panestream fixture-drift canary: a tiny live probe at preflight that runs one claude turn in tmux and asserts PaneBusy reads true mid-turn (catches future chrome changes BEFORE a batch burns). Mitigation already shipped: busySpinnerStatsRE matches the spinner stats line as busy chrome.
evidence_pointer: .evolve/runs/cycle-286/retrospective-report.md (D1, misattributed to plan limits); go/internal/bridge/panestream/testdata/claude/thinking-v2.1.173.txt (live-captured frame, no esc affordance); ledger stop_review pause entries 10:15/10:20Z
